ksa_text: Ability to monitor emerging regulatory requirements and assess the impact of regulatory changes on organizational compliance posture and strategic priorities.

dcwf.top_element_label: Define and/or implement policies and procedures to enable an AI risk assessment process and assess risk mitigation efforts.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Define and/or implement policies and procedures to enable an AI risk assessment process and assess risk mitigation efforts.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Although Regulatory Compliance is an edge domain for the Chief Data Scientist, this ability KSA presents sufficient signal (composite score 0.559) and conceptual alignment to include at the c suite level.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope (Regulatory Compliance), seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with inclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Pass 1 signal is moderate (composite 0.559). External reviewers may question whether this specific ability KSA is sufficiently distinctive for the Chief Data Scientist versus adjacent roles.
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: GDPR, CCPA, EU AI Act, and SEC data governance regulations confirm regulatory compliance knowledge for governance-focused leadership.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: moderate framework signal is consistent with Regulatory Compliance appearing in job postings and role definition literature for Chief Data Scientist.

decision_rationale: Edge-domain Regulatory Compliance ability KSA cleared adversarial review with score 0.559. Included based on sufficient framework alignment and role relevance for the Chief Data Scientist.
